plugins.name: planning-first
plugins.description: Forces a plan-first workflow: analyze requirements, propose an architecture, and get explicit approval before writing any code or files.

plugins.name: it-prompt-specialist
plugins.description: Senior multidisciplinary IT expert lens across software, cloud, security, AI/ML, networking, and more.

plugins.name: export-project
plugins.description: The /export_project command: analyzes an entire project and generates a durable, LLM-portable knowledge package (blueprint, context JSON, rebuild prompt, decision log, development state) for handoff and reconstruction.
